hero.name: Sara Ahmed
hero.tagline: Building scalable and user-friendly web applications.

about.title: About Me
about.headline: Passionate About Crafting Great Interfaces
about.text: I'm a frontend developer who specializes in Angular, focused on building high-performance, scalable web applications. I write clean, maintainable code and love turning complex requirements into elegant user experiences.

performance.title: Performance-First
performance.description: Focusing on fast loading, smooth interactions, and optimized delivery.

integration.title: API Integration
integration.description: Building clean client-side interfaces with reusable data flows.

expertise.title: Angular Expertise
expertise.description: Strong experience with Angular, RxJS, and modern frontend architecture.

cleanCode.title: Clean Code
cleanCode.description: Writing maintainable, testable, and well-structured applications.

skills.title: Skills
skills.headline: Tech Stack and Tools
skills.description: I specialize in developing dynamic and maintainable applications using modern frontend technologies. I have hands-on experience with component-based architecture, state management, and building responsive UI systems. I focus on writing clean, scalable code and collaborating effectively within teams using Git and best development practices.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.angular: Angular (Standalone Components, Routing, Guards, Lazy Loading)

devTrack.title: Front-End Developer – Elevate Academy
devTrack.summary: Developed scalable Angular applications following Clean Architecture and SOLID principles.

highlights.1: Implemented advanced state management using NgRx and Angular Signals.
highlights.2: Integrated RESTful APIs and built secure authentication systems using Route Guards.
highlights.3: Designed responsive and modern user interfaces using Tailwind CSS and PrimeNG.
highlights.4: Applied Lazy Loading and performance optimization techniques to enhance application efficiency.
highlights.5: Wrote unit tests to ensure application reliability and maintainability.
highlights.6: Collaborated in an Agile/Scrum environment using GitHub and Jira.

freelancePractice.title: Frontend Developer (Angular)
freelancePractice.summary: Developed responsive and user-friendly interfaces using Angular.

highlights.1: Built reusable and dynamic components following component-based architecture.
highlights.2: Integrated applications with RESTful APIs and handled asynchronous data efficiently.
highlights.3: Collaborated with backend developers to ensure smooth integration.
highlights.4: Applied TypeScript and Angular best practices to write clean and maintainable code.

specialization.title: Online Programming Instructor
specialization.summary: Delivered interactive programming sessions for children, focusing on coding fundamentals.

highlights.1: Taught visual programming using python and introduced basic JavaScript concepts.
highlights.2: Designed engaging learning materials to simplify complex concepts.
highlights.3: Helped students improve logical thinking and problem-solving skills.

adminDashboard.title: Roze App
adminDashboard.description: A scalable web application with two main modules: a customer-facing interface and an admin dashboard. The customer side focuses on responsive design and smooth user interactions, while the admin panel features data visualization, advanced filtering, role-based access control, and efficient data management.

taskPlatform.title: Place Recommendation System
taskPlatform.description: A smart place recommendation system that relies on analyzing user preferences and behavior to provide personalized suggestions. It offers an interactive user interface for displaying places with search and filtering capabilities, along with a management system that allows control over data and improves recommendation accuracy.

travelBooking.title: E-commerce Platform
travelBooking.description: e-commerce platform with SSR to improve initial load time and SEO, featuring secure authentication, a responsive UI, and a fully managed cart system.
